description: Sample personalised email outputs from the FastAPI microservice for 3 visitor personas. Shows what the LLM generates vs the static fallback.

outputs.persona: Enterprise — VP Operations, Industrial Distributor, Return Visit
outputs.routing: Enterprise tier → Slack alert to sales rep (no auto-email)
outputs.email_generated_for: Sales rep context — rep sends this manually

llm_output.subject_line: How GlobalParts could unify its dealer network, Sarah
llm_output.opening_paragraph: I noticed GlobalParts has been evaluating our Enterprise plan — and came back for a second look. Companies managing dealer networks at your scale typically find the Dealer Portal module cuts onboarding time significantly, especially when field reps are accessing the system across different regions.
llm_output.cta_line: Would a 20-minute walkthrough be useful this week? https://calendly.com/sellerscommerce/demo?utm_source=pricing-workflow&utm_tier=enterprise&utm_visit=return

outputs.persona: Mid-Market — Head of E-commerce, Fashion Brand, First Visit
outputs.routing: Mid-Market tier → AI-personalised email sent immediately

full_email.subject: Trendcraft's catalogue management — worth a look, Rahul
full_email.body:
Hi Rahul,

I saw Trendcraft was exploring our Growth plan earlier — specifically the features around catalogue and inventory management. Fashion brands at your stage typically get the most immediate value from the variant management and bulk upload capabilities, especially when SKU counts are growing faster than the team.

Would a 20-minute walkthrough be useful this week? https://calendly.com/sellerscommerce/demo?utm_source=pricing-workflow&utm_tier=growth&utm_visit=first

Best,
[Sales Rep Name]
SellersCommerce

llm_output.subject_line: Trendcraft's catalogue management — worth a look, Rahul
llm_output.opening_paragraph: I saw Trendcraft was exploring our Growth plan earlier — specifically the features around catalogue and inventory management. Fashion brands at your stage typically get the most immediate value from the variant management and bulk upload capabilities, especially when SKU counts are growing faster than the team.
llm_output.cta_line: Would a 20-minute walkthrough be useful this week? https://calendly.com/sellerscommerce/demo?utm_source=pricing-workflow&utm_tier=growth&utm_visit=first

outputs.persona: Mid-Market — CTO, E-commerce Tech Company, Third Visit
outputs.routing: Mid-Market tier → AI-personalised email sent immediately

full_email.subject: NexCart's third look at our Pro plan, Priya
full_email.body:
Hi Priya,

NexCart has come back to our Pro plan three times now — that usually means you're evaluating something specific rather than just browsing. Given your stack (you're clearly API-forward), the headless commerce architecture and the way our CommerceEDGE layer exposes workflow automation via API might be worth 20 minutes of your time.

Would a focused technical walkthrough this week work? https://calendly.com/sellerscommerce/demo?utm_source=pricing-workflow&utm_tier=pro&utm_visit=return

Best,
[Sales Rep Name]
SellersCommerce

llm_output.subject_line: NexCart's third look at our Pro plan, Priya
llm_output.opening_paragraph: NexCart has come back to our Pro plan three times now — that usually means you're evaluating something specific rather than just browsing. Given your stack, the headless commerce architecture and the way our CommerceEDGE layer exposes workflow automation via API might be exactly what you're assessing.
llm_output.cta_line: Would a focused technical walkthrough this week work? https://calendly.com/sellerscommerce/demo?utm_source=pricing-workflow&utm_tier=pro&utm_visit=return

outputs.persona: Mid-Market — LLM failure scenario — fallback template used
outputs.routing: Mid-Market tier → email sent using static fallback
outputs.note: Demonstrates that the workflow never breaks even when LLM fails. Email still sends.
